```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.85em;">missing values is just one example</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6em;">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">?</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;">Outliers</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.15em;">Drop them &mdash; or are they the phenomenon?</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6em;">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">?</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;">Model assumptions</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.15em;">Violation: fatal &mdash; or tolerable for this question?</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6em;">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">?</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;">Collinearity</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.15em;">Drop the covariate &mdash; or keep for theory?</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6em;">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">?</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;">p = 0.04</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.15em;">An effect &mdash; or evidence you ran enough tests?</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;text-align:center;font-size:0.65em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.5;">
  Two competent analysts can <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">disagree</span> &mdash; and both be doing real science.
 </div>

</div>
```
